phases.label: Concept Check
goals: Assess understanding of the module's central ideas
Confirm accurate comprehension of key taught concepts

phases.label: Applied Reasoning
goals: Apply module concepts to a realistic clinical scenario

phases.label: Prioritization and Safety
goals: Identify key concerns and sequence actions appropriately
Recognize risks, contraindications, and safety limitations

phases.label: Reflection and Transfer
goals: Demonstrate how the module changes clinical practice
Identify limits of the material and appropriate boundaries of use
